title: Adapter Ligation with AMX
author: Josh Quick
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdp5i5q6

steps.title: Set up the following AMX adapter ligation reaction
steps.instruction: Set up the following AMX adapter ligation reaction: Component Volume End-repaired amplicon pools 30 µL Ligation Buffer (LNB) 10 µL Adapter Mix (AMX) 5 µL Quick T4 DNA Ligase 5 µL Total 50 µL There will be some variation in clean-up efficiencies but expect to carry around 80% through a clean-up.

steps.title: Add 50 µL (1:1) of SPRI...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL (1:1) of SPRI beads to the sample tube and mix gently by either flicking or pipetting. Vortex SPRI beads thoroughly before use to ensure they are well resuspended, the solution should be a homogenous brown colour.

steps.title: Pulse centrifuge to collect all liquid...
steps.instruction: Pulse centrifuge to collect all liquid at the bottom of the tube.

steps.title: Place on magnetic rack and incubate...
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic rack and incubate for 00:02:00 or until the beads have pelleted and the supernatant is completely clear.

steps.title: Carefully remove and discard the supernatant,...
steps.instruction: Carefully remove and discard the supernatant, being careful not to touch the bead pellet.

steps.title: Add 250 µL SFB and resuspend...
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL SFB and resuspend beads completely by pipette mixing. SFB will remove excess adapter without damaging the adapter-protein complexes. Do not use 70% ethanol as in early clean-ups.

steps.title: Pulse centrifuge to collect all liquid...
steps.instruction: Pulse centrifuge to collect all liquid at the bottom of the tube.

steps.title: Repeat steps 14-16 to perform a second SFB wash
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 14-16 to perform a second SFB wash.

steps.title: Pulse centrifuge and remove any residual SFB
steps.instruction: Pulse centrifuge and remove any residual SFB. You do not need to allow to air dry with SFB washes.

steps.title: Add 15 µL EB and resuspend beads by pipette mixing
steps.instruction: Add 15 µL EB and resuspend beads by pipette mixing.

steps.title: Transfer final library to a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer final library to a new 1.5mL Eppendorf tube.
